en: Now the Feast of Unleavened Bread drew near, which is called the Passover.
zh: 除酵節又名逾越節近了。

en: And the chief priests and the scribes were seeking how to put him to death, for they feared the people.
zh: 祭司長和經學家設法怎樣殺害耶穌，因為他們懼怕群眾。

en: Then Satan entered into Judas called Iscariot, who was of the number of the twelve.
zh: 那時，撒但已經進入加略人猶大的心，他原是十二門徒中的一個。

en: He went away and conferred with the chief priests and officers how he might betray him to them.
zh: 他去與祭司長和守殿官商量怎樣把耶穌交給他們。

en: And they were glad, and agreed to give him money.
zh: 他們很高興，約定了給他銀子。

en: So he consented and sought an opportunity to betray him to them in the absence of a crowd.
zh: 他答應了，就尋找機會，要趁群眾不在的時候，把耶穌交給他們。

en: Then came the day of Unleavened Bread, on which the Passover lamb had to be sacrificed.
zh: 除酵日到了，在這一天應當宰殺逾越節的羊羔。

en: So Jesus sent Peter and John, saying, "Go and prepare the Passover for us, that we may eat it."
zh: 耶穌差派彼得和約翰，說：“你們去為我們預備逾越節的晚餐給我們吃。”

en: They said to him, "Where will you have us prepare it?"
zh: 他們說：“你要我們在哪裡預備呢？”

en: He said to them, "Behold, when you have entered the city, a man carrying a jar of water will meet you. Follow him into the house that he enters
zh: 他說：“你們進了城，必有一個人頂著水罐，迎面而來，你們就跟著他，到他所進的那一家，

en: and tell the master of the house, 'The Teacher says to you, Where is the guest room, where I may eat the Passover with my disciples?'
zh: 對家主說，老師問你：‘客廳在哪裡？我和門徒好在那裡吃逾越節的晚餐。’

en: And he will show you a large upper room furnished; prepare it there."
zh: 他必指示你們樓上一間布置整齊的大房子，你們就在那裡預備。”

en: And they went and found it just as he had told them, and they prepared the Passover.
zh: 他們去了，所遇見的正像耶穌所說的一樣，就預備好了逾越節的晚餐。

en: And when the hour came, he reclined at table, and the apostles with him.
zh: 到了時候，耶穌和使徒一同吃飯。

en: And he said to them, "I have earnestly desired to eat this Passover with you before I suffer.
zh: 他說：“我十分願意在受難以前，跟你們吃這逾越節的晚餐。

en: For I tell you I will not eat it until it is fulfilled in the kingdom of God."
zh: 我告訴你們，我決不再吃這晚餐，直到它成就在 神的國裡。”

en: And he took a cup, and when he had given thanks he said, "Take this, and divide it among yourselves.
zh: 耶穌接過杯來，感謝了，說：“你們拿這個，大家分著喝。

en: For I tell you that from now on I will not drink of the fruit of the vine until the kingdom of God comes."
zh: 我告訴你們，從今以後，我決不再喝這葡萄酒，直到 神的國來臨。”

en: And he took bread, and when he had given thanks, he broke it and gave it to them, saying, "This is my body, which is given for you. Do this in remembrance of me."
zh: 他拿起餅來，感謝了，擘開遞給他們，說：“這是我的身體，為你們捨的，你們應當這樣行，為的是記念我。”

en: And likewise the cup after they had eaten, saying, "This cup that is poured out for you is the new covenant in my blood.
zh: 飯後，他照樣拿起杯來，說：“這杯是用我的血所立的新約，這血是為你們流的。

en: But behold, the hand of him who betrays me is with me on the table.
zh: 你看，出賣我的人的手和我一同在桌子上，

en: For the Son of Man goes as it has been determined, but woe to that man by whom he is betrayed!"
zh: 人子固然要照所預定的離世，但出賣人子的那人有禍了！”

en: And they began to question one another, which of them it could be who was going to do this.
zh: 於是，門徒彼此對問，他們中間誰要作這事。

en: A dispute also arose among them, as to which of them was to be regarded as the greatest.
zh: 門徒中間又起了爭論：他們中間誰是最大的。

en: And he said to them, "The kings of the Gentiles exercise lordship over them, and those in authority over them are called benefactors.
zh: 耶穌對他們說：“各國都有君王統治他們，他們的掌權者稱為恩主，

en: But not so with you. Rather, let the greatest among you become as the youngest, and the leader as one who serves.
zh: 但你們卻不要這樣；你們中間最大的，應當像最小的；作首領的，應當像服事人的。

en: For who is the greater, one who reclines at table or one who serves? Is it not the one who reclines at table? But I am among you as the one who serves.
zh: 哪一個大呢？是坐著吃喝的還是服事人的呢？不是坐著吃喝的嗎？然而我在你們中間，如同服事人的。

en: "You are those who have stayed with me in my trials,
zh: 我在磨煉之中，常常和我同在的就是你們。

en: and I assign to you, as my Father assigned to me, a kingdom,
zh: 父怎樣把王權賜給我，我也照樣賜給你們，

en: that you may eat and drink at my table in my kingdom and sit on thrones judging the twelve tribes of Israel.
zh: 叫你們在我的國裡坐在我的席上吃喝，又坐在寶座上審判以色列的十二支派。

en: "Simon, Simon, behold, Satan demanded to have you, that he might sift you like wheat,
zh: “西門，西門，撒但設法要得著你們，好篩你們像篩麥子一樣；

en: but I have prayed for you that your faith may not fail. And when you have turned again, strengthen your brothers."
zh: 但我已經為你祈求，叫你的信心不至失掉。你回頭的時候，要堅固你的弟兄。”

en: Peter said to him, "Lord, I am ready to go with you both to prison and to death."
zh: 彼得說：“主啊！我已經準備好要跟你一同下監，一同死。”

en: Jesus said, "I tell you, Peter, the rooster will not crow this day, until you deny three times that you know me."
zh: 耶穌說：“彼得，我告訴你，今天雞叫以前，你會三次說不認得我。”

en: And he said to them, "When I sent you out with no moneybag or knapsack or sandals, did you lack anything?" They said, "Nothing."
zh: 耶穌又對他們說：“從前我差你們出去，沒有帶錢囊、口袋、鞋子，你們缺乏甚麼沒有？”他們說：“沒有。”

en: He said to them, "But now let the one who has a moneybag take it, and likewise a knapsack. And let the one who has no sword sell his cloak and buy one.
zh: 耶穌說：“但現在，有錢囊的應當帶著，有口袋的也是這樣；沒有刀的，要賣掉衣服去買刀。

en: For I tell you that this Scripture must be fulfilled in me: 'And he was numbered with the transgressors.' For what is written about me has its fulfillment."
zh: 我告訴你們，‘他被列在不法者之中’這句經文，必定應驗在我身上，因為關於我的事必然成就。”

en: And they said, "Look, Lord, here are two swords." And he said to them, "It is enough."
zh: 他們說：“主啊，請看，這裡有兩把刀。”耶穌說：“夠了。”

en: And he came out and went, as was his custom, to the Mount of Olives, and the disciples followed him.
zh: 耶穌照常到橄欖山去，門徒也跟著他。

en: And when he came to the place, he said to them, "Pray that you may not enter into temptation."
zh: 到了那裡，他對門徒說：“你們應當禱告，免得陷入試探。”

en: And he withdrew from them about a stone's throw, and knelt down and prayed,
zh: 於是耶穌離開他們約有扔一塊石頭那麼遠，跪下禱告說：

en: saying, "Father, if you are willing, remove this cup from me. Nevertheless, not my will, but yours, be done."
zh: “父啊，如果你願意，就把這杯拿走！但不要成就我的意思，只要成就你的旨意。”

en: And there appeared to him an angel from heaven, strengthening him.
And being in an agony he prayed more earnestly; and his sweat became like great drops of blood falling down to the ground.
And when he rose from prayer, he came to the disciples and found them sleeping for sorrow,
zh: 他禱告完了，就起來到門徒那裡，看見他們因為憂愁都睡著了，

en: and he said to them, "Why are you sleeping? Rise and pray that you may not enter into temptation."
zh: 就說：“你們為甚麼睡覺呢？起來禱告！免得陷入試探。”

en: While he was still speaking, there came a crowd, and the man called Judas, one of the twelve, was leading them. He drew near to Jesus to kiss him,
zh: 耶穌還在說話的時候，來了一群人，十二門徒中的猶大走在前頭，到了耶穌跟前要用嘴親他。

en: but Jesus said to him, "Judas, would you betray the Son of Man with a kiss?"
zh: 耶穌對他說：“猶大，你用親吻作暗號出賣人子嗎？”

en: And when those who were around him saw what would follow, they said, "Lord, shall we strike with the sword?"
zh: 左右的人見了，就說：“主啊，我們用刀砍好嗎？”

en: And one of them struck the servant of the high priest and cut off his right ear.
zh: 他們中間有一個人砍了大祭司的僕人一刀，削掉他的右耳。

en: But Jesus said, "No more of this!" And he touched his ear and healed him.
zh: 耶穌說：“由他們吧！”就摸那人的耳朵，醫好了他。

en: Then Jesus said to the chief priests and officers of the temple and elders, who had come out against him, "Have you come out as against a robber, with swords and clubs?
zh: 耶穌對那些前來捉拿他的祭司長、守殿官和長老說：“你們帶著刀棒出來，把我當作強盜捉拿嗎？

en: When I was with you day after day in the temple, you did not lay hands on me. But this is your hour, and the power of darkness."
zh: 我天天跟你們在殿裡，你們不向我下手；但現在是你們的時候了，也是黑暗掌權的時候了。”

en: Then they seized him and led him away, bringing him into the high priest's house, and Peter was following at a distance.
zh: 他們拿住耶穌，押到大祭司家裡，彼得遠遠地跟著。

en: And when they had kindled a fire in the middle of the courtyard and sat down together, Peter sat down among them.
zh: 他們在院內生了火，一同坐著，彼得也坐在他們中間。

en: Then a servant girl, seeing him as he sat in the light and looking closely at him, said, "This man also was with him."
zh: 有一個使女，見他面向火光坐著，就注視他，說：“這人是和他一夥的。”

en: But he denied it, saying, "Woman, I do not know him."
zh: 彼得卻否認，說：“你這個女人，我不認得他。”

en: And a little later someone else saw him and said, "You also are one of them." But Peter said, "Man, I am not."
zh: 不久，另一個人看見他，就說：“你也是他們中間的一個。”彼得說：“你這個人，我不是。”

en: And after an interval of about an hour still another insisted, saying, "Certainly this man also was with him, for he too is a Galilean."
zh: 大約過了一小時，又有一個人肯定地說：“這人真是和他一夥的，因為他也是加利利人。”

en: But Peter said, "Man, I do not know what you are talking about." And immediately, while he was still speaking, the rooster crowed.
zh: 彼得說：“你這個人，我不知道你說的是甚麼！”他還在說話的時候，雞就叫了。

en: And the Lord turned and looked at Peter. And Peter remembered the saying of the Lord, how he had said to him, "Before the rooster crows today, you will deny me three times."
zh: 主轉過身來看彼得，彼得就想起主對他說過的話：“今天雞叫以前，你要三次說不認得我。”

en: And he went out and wept bitterly.
zh: 他就出去痛哭。

en: Now the men who were holding Jesus in custody were mocking him as they beat him.
zh: 看管耶穌的人戲弄他，打他，

en: They also blindfolded him and kept asking him, "Prophesy! Who is it that struck you?"
zh: 蒙住他的眼睛問他：“你說預言吧，說打你的是誰。”

en: And they said many other things against him, blaspheming him.
zh: 他們還說了許多別的辱罵他的話。

en: When day came, the assembly of the elders of the people gathered together, both chief priests and scribes. And they led him away to their council, and they said,
zh: 天一亮，民間的長老、祭司長和經學家就都聚集，把他帶到他們的公議會裡，說：

en: "If you are the Christ, tell us." But he said to them, "If I tell you, you will not believe,
zh: “你若是基督，就告訴我們吧。”耶穌說：“就算我告訴你們，你們也決不相信。

en: and if I ask you, you will not answer.
zh: 如果我問你們，你們也決不回答。

en: But from now on the Son of Man shall be seated at the right hand of the power of God."
zh: 從今以後，人子要坐在 神權能的右邊。”

en: So they all said, "Are you the Son of God, then?" And he said to them, "You say that I am."
zh: 他們說：“那麼你是 神的兒子嗎？”耶穌說：“你們說了，我是。”

en: Then they said, "What further testimony do we need? We have heard it ourselves from his own lips."
zh: 他們說：“我們還需要甚麼見證呢？我們親自聽見他所說的話了。”
